transcript: Speaker A: ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀಯಾ? [What are you doing?] Speaker B: I am sleeping. I am sleeping ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ formal ಆಗಿ 'I am getting some sleep' ಅಂತ ಕೂಡ ಹೇಳಬಹುದು. [You should say 'I am sleeping'. You can also say 'I am getting some sleep' to be a bit formal.] Speaker A: ಓ ಹೌದಾ. ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲಿಬೇಕು? [Oh really. How to learn English?] Speaker B: ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ 15 minutes daily practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು, 1 month ಅಲ್ಲಿ english ಕಲಿಯಬಹುದು. [Just practice with me for 15 minutes daily, you can learn English in 1 month.] Speaker A: ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಖರ್ಚಾಗುತ್ತಾ? [Does it cost a lot?] Speaker B: ಕೇವಲ 1 Rupee ಗೆ ಈ app ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ try ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. 1 Crores+ people ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ english ಕಲಿತಾ ಇದ್ದಾರೆ. [You can try this app completely for just 1 Rupee. Over 1 Crore+ people are learning English with me.] Speaker A: ಸೂಪರ್! ಹೇಗೆ join ಆಗೋದು? [Super! How to join?] Speaker B: ಈಗಲೇ MySivi app download ಮಾಡಿ english ಕಲಿಯೋದನ್ನು ಶುರು ಮಾಡು. [Download MySivi app now and start learning English.] Speaker C: Click on install now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text: ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀಯಾ? [What are you doing?] sleeping. ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. [should say.] ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ formal ಆಗಿ 'i am getting some sleep' ಅಂತ ಕೂಡ ಹೇಳಬಹುದು. [You can also say 'I am getting some sleep' to be a bit formal.] ಹೌದಾ. [Really.] ಕಲಿಯಬೇಕು? [How to learn?] ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ [With me every day] 15 MIN daily practice 1 Month english ಕಲಿಯಬಹುದು. [Can learn English in 1 month.] ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಖರ್ಚು ಆಗುತ್ತಾ? [Does it cost a lot?] 1 Rupee Only ಈ app ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ [This app completely] 1 CRORES+ PEOPLE ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ english [1 Crore+ people with me English] ಸೂಪರ್! [Super!] ಹೇಗೆ join ಆಗೋದು? [How to join?] ಈಗಲೇ app download [Download app now] ಕಲಿಯೋದನ್ನು ಶುರು [Start learning] MySivi AI English Speaking App Install Now
summary: A split-screen Kannada ad for the MySivi AI English Speaking App featuring an AI avatar correcting a human's English. The AI explains that users can learn English in one month with 15 minutes of daily practice. It promotes a 1 Rupee trial offer and urges viewers to download the app.
